description: The Ferrari F12 Berlinetta, produced from 2012 to 2017, is powered by a front-mounted 6.3-litre V12 producing 730 bhp. As the most powerful naturally aspirated Ferrari road car of its era, the F12 succeeded the 599 GTB and delivered supercar performance in a grand tourer package. The limited-run F12tdf variant is exceptionally collectible.
